solutions.solution: (d) Each letter is coded with its left and right letters in English alphabet. As, 7 15 → 6 8 14 16 G O → F H N P. Similarly, 19 21 14 → 18 20 20 22 13 15 S U N → R T T V M O ∴ SUN ⇒ RTTVMO

(d) Each letter is coded with its left and right letters in English alphabet. As, 12 1 16 → 11 13 26 2 15 17 L A P → K M Z B O Q. Similarly, 14 15 20 5 → 13 16 14 16 19 21 4 6 N O T E → M O N P S U D F ∴ NOTE ⇒ MONPSUDF

(c) Starting from right end, each letter is coded with its left and right letters of English alphabet. As, 20 15 16 → 15 17 14 16 19 21 T O P → O Q N P S U and 18 1 20 → 19 21 26 2 17 19 R A T → S U Z B Q S. Similarly, 7 21 14 → 13 15 20 22 6 8 G U N → M O T V F H ∴ GUN ⇒ MOTVFH

(d) Each letter is coded with its left and right letters in English alphabet. As, 18 1 13 → 17 19 26 2 12 14 R A M → Q S Z B L N and 12 15 22 5 → 11 13 14 16 21 23 4 6 L O V E → K M N P U W D F. Similarly, 1 3 20 → 26 2 2 4 19 21 A C T → Z B B D S U ∴ ACT ⇒ ZBBDSU

(c) Each letter is coded with its left and right letters of English alphabet. As, 14 1 13 5 → 13 15 26 2 12 14 4 6 N A M E → M O Z B L N D F and 16 21 14 → 15 17 20 22 13 15 P U N → O Q T V M O. Similarly, 20 1 12 11 → 19 21 26 2 11 13 10 12 T A L K → S U Z B K M J L ∴ TALK ⇒ SUZBKMJL

(c) Each letter is coded with its left and right letters in English alphabet. As, 14 9 12 → 13 15 8 10 11 13 N I L → M O H J K M. Similarly, 3 15 13 2 → 2 4 14 16 12 14 1 3 C O M B → B D N P L N A C ∴ COMB ⇒ BDNPLNAC
